sourcePrompt: An RPG-7, the NVA and VC shoulder-fired anti-armor launcher, about a meter of tube with a pointed rocket adding another third. A straight launch tube flaring into a wide blast cone at the rear, a bulbous wooden heat shield wrapping the middle, a pistol grip and trigger underneath, iron sights on top, and a teardrop-shaped rocket grenade seated in the muzzle. Olive-green tube, brown wood, dark warhead.
